'''Tree-ticks''' were [[Parasite/Legends|parasites]] that lived in the [[Tree/Legends|trees]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. [[Woolamander/Legends|Woolamanders]] were one of the animals that they preyed on.

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}}
